lore.english:
UFS soldier with the rank of second lieutenant, and the captain of the UFS Army Special Mechanized Corps "Storm Cat". She showed valor in real combat using exoskeletons and participated as "arms and legs" of the military advisor in the anti-UFS terrorist war. After high-ranking demons fought in the UFS, she was sent to Gosha to forge a tight alliance between Japan and the UFS, and is now operating together with the Taimanin task force.

She is an elite exoskeleton pilot, and her primary suit is the XPS-11A, known as the "Bone". It is an outdated model, but when she uses it, it shows great strength. Also, as the captain of the Storm Cat squad, she deploys to the battlefield and shows commanding skills that turn the tide of the battle.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&CRI_DMG] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase CRIT DMG of All allies by 20% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase CRIT DMG of All allies by 20% in All Battles

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Full Metal Jacket[-]
skills.description:
Fires the rifle in short bursts at the enemy.
When defeating an enemy with this skill, fills the character's [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1030102]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1030102]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Fires the rifle in short bursts at the enemy.
When defeating an enemy with this skill, fills the character's Turn Gauge by (20%) at a -25% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Smoke Grenade[-]
skills.description:
Throws a smoke grenade to attack [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
Targets are inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1030202]%)[-] [&AccDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1030202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1030202] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Throws a smoke grenade to attack ALL enemies.
Targets are inflicted with (-20%) ACC DOWN at a 75% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Satellite Beam[-]
skills.description:
Throws a signal beacon to mark the location where a bomb will fall, attacking [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
Targets hit are inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1030302]%)[-] [&Burn] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1030302]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1030302] turn(s)
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]30%[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionAfter], inflicts [&Stun] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1030303]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1030303] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Throws a signal beacon to mark the location where a bomb will fall, attacking ALL enemies.
Targets hit are inflicted with (3.5%) Burn at a 75% chance.
Duration: 3 turn(s)
If the target's HP is less than 30% after the attack, inflicts Faint at a 25% chance.
Duration: 1 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Captain of the "Storm Cats"[-]
skills.description:
On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart], gains [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1030401]%)[-] [&CriRateUp]. 
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1030401] turn(s)
When defeating an enemy [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionAfter], resets [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] for [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_10304].
skills.description_readable:
On Turn Start, gains (32.5%) CRIT Rate UP. 
Duration: 2 turn(s)
When defeating an enemy after the attack, resets Cooldown for Captain of the "Storm Cats".

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_10301]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_10301]
skill_data.description:
Fires the rifle in short bursts at the enemy.
When defeating an enemy with this skill, gains [&Common_Word_Skill_AddTurn].
skill_data.description_readable:
Fires the rifle in short bursts at the enemy.
When defeating an enemy with this skill, gains Extra Turn.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_10302]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_10303]
skill_data.description:
Throws a signal beacon to mark the bomb drop location, to attack [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
Targets hit are inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1031302]%)[-] [&Burn].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1031302] turn(s)
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]30%[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionAfter], additionally inflicts [&Burn].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1031303] turn(s)
skill_data.description_readable:
Throws a signal beacon to mark the bomb drop location, to attack ALL enemies.
Targets hit are inflicted with (3.5%) Burn.
Duration: 3 turn(s)
If the target's HP is less than 30% after the attack, additionally inflicts Burn.
Duration: 3 turn(s)
